explicit_limitations: The local live run used a credential with production admin/push despite the handoff stop condition; no production mutation was observed, but least privilege was not technically enforced.
The returned bundle abbreviates raw OpenTofu plan/apply and negative Git command transcripts; repository state and configuration corroborate the result, but traceability is incomplete.
required_baseline_changes: Set platformCommit=disabled in symlink-bearing template repositories.
Treat .gitmodules branch=vX.Y.Z only as a Renovate version marker and never use git submodule update --remote for release selection.
Use built-in Renovate pep621 for tool.uv.sources Git tags; no regex fallback.
Remove Workflow Publisher App/custom updater from target architecture.
Split runtime, policy, and testkit into standalone repositories.
Pin integrations/github provider 6.13.0 for the validated OpenTofu configuration.
Use a least-privilege selected-repository credential before production-like mutations.
